shared_properties: The widget uses the 10x16 digit atlas for every numeric glyph.
The widget stays in the top-right safe area with monochrome text styling.
The display shows five digits with zero padding from the first frame of play.
differences: The widget composes five numeric slots rather than a raw atlas sheet.
The right edge aligns 10px from the screen boundary.
A milestone flash state can invert to the background color for 100ms.

context.usage: Always-visible score widget during gameplay with zero-padded numeric output.

shape.silhouette: Five-digit right-aligned score rack with equal-width numeric slots.

acceptance_criteria: The widget supports five visible numeric cells with zero padding from 00000 to 99999.
The rightmost painted pixel sits 10px from the 600px screen edge when placed at the declared position.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_2x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds score glyph spacing and the game-over text treatment used in the HUD.

reference_images.label: t_rex_runner_sprite_sheet_1x
reference_images.purpose: Grounds score glyph spacing and the game-over text treatment used in the HUD.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle backed by a nearest-neighbor texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Anchor the HUD to whole pixels in the top-right or screen-center layout zone.
Keep all glyph quads on nearest-neighbor sampling to preserve the retro mono-space look.
Expose the atlas handle through a HUD resource so score and restart states can swap visibility without reallocating textures.
